_doc: Tracks the last point at which we audited the team-app repo for changes that could affect the customer-portal. Updated automatically by the sync workflow.
notes: customer-notify v10 — added 5 new internal AM events (design_approved, design_revision_requested, proposal_item_added, first_login, brand_asset_uploaded) and extended payment_received to ALSO email AM + PM. 5 new DB triggers added: notify_team_design_approved, notify_team_design_revision_requested, notify_team_proposal_item_added (skips initial wizard batch by 60s grace), notify_team_first_login (fires when contacts.last_login_at NULL→non-null), notify_team_brand_asset_uploaded (fires only when uploaded_by IS NULL, i.e. customer-uploaded). design_revision_requested handler distinguishes 'Not right' from normal revision via the [Start over] prefix in client_feedback and titles the email accordingly.
